parameters.query:
SELECT
  ma.member_agreement_id,
  ma.member_id,
  ma.facilitator_id,
  ma.status,
  ma.signature_method,
  ma.documenso_document_id,
  ma.documenso_external_id,
  ma.review_notes,
  ma.canceled_at,
  ma.cancel_reason
FROM public.member_agreements ma
WHERE ma.member_agreement_id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE public.member_agreements
SET
  status = 'canceled',
  canceled_at = now(),
  canceled_by = NULLIF($2, '')::uuid,
  cancel_reason = NULLIF(convert_from(decode($3, 'base64'), 'UTF8'), ''),
  review_notes = NULLIF(convert_from(decode($3, 'base64'), 'UTF8'), ''),
  documenso_cancel_response = convert_from(decode($4, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE member_agreement_id = $1::uuid
  AND status = 'pending_signature'
  AND signature_method = 'documenso'
RETURNING
  member_agreement_id,
  member_id,
  status,
  canceled_at,
  canceled_by,
  cancel_reason,
  documenso_document_id;

INSERT INTO public.audit_log (
  actor,
  action,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  details
)
VALUES (
  COALESCE(NULLIF($7, ''), NULLIF($2, ''), 'unknown'),
  'agreement.documenso_canceled',
  'member_agreement',
  $1,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'member_id', NULLIF($3, ''),
    'actor_member_id', NULLIF($2, ''),
    'actor_email', NULLIF($7, ''),
    'reason', NULLIF(convert_from(decode($4, 'base64'), 'UTF8'), ''),
    'documenso_document_id', NULLIF($5, ''),
    'documenso_external_id', NULLIF($6, ''),
    'page', 'Members - Profile'
  )
)
RETURNING audit_log_id;
